mapper.select: select * from mw_space where space_id = #{spaceId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select count(*) from mw_space where is_delete = 0

SELECT s.* FROM mw_space s LEFT JOIN mw_space_user su ON s.space_id = su.space_id AND su.user_id = #{userId} WHERE s.is_delete = 0 AND ( s.visit_level = 'public' OR su.space_user_id IS NOT NULL)
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY s.space_id ORDER BY s.space_id DESC
select * from mw_space where is_delete = 0 order by space_id desc
select * from mw_space where tags like concat('%', #{tag}, '%') and is_delete = 0 order by space_id desc

select * from mw_space where is_delete = 0
and space_id in
#{id}
and 1 = 0
select count(*) from mw_space where name = #{name} and is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: insert into mw_space(name, description, tags, visit_level, is_share, is_export, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{visitLevel}, #{isShare}, #{isExport}, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update mw_space set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tags = #{tags}, visit_level = #{visitLevel}, is_share = #{isShare}, is_export = #{isExport}, update_time = #{updateTime} where space_id = #{spaceId} and is_delete = 0
update mw_space set is_delete = 1, update_time = now() where space_id = #{spaceId} and is_delete = 0
